whenToUse.summary: A front-end product priced $27-$97 designed specifically to BREAK EVEN on cold ad spend so all upsell revenue becomes pure profit. A squeeze/lead page leads to the core product via a VSL or long-form sales letter, with an order-form bump and an OTO sequence. Distinct from the tripwire in price point and margin structure: SLO carries real margin and aims to recover the full cost of acquiring a customer at the order page.
goals: Recover 100% of cold ad spend on the front-end before any follow-up runs
Sell a $27-$97 info/digital product to cold traffic
Build a buyer list while breaking even
signals: Front-end price stated in the $27-$97 band
Explicit goal of breaking even on ad spend / 'pay for itself'
Digital/info product (course, toolkit, templates) rather than a free sample
Cold paid traffic with a defined upsell ladder
antiSignals: Front-end is free/just-shipping -> route to 2-Step Tripwire/Free-Plus-Shipping
A video alone makes the whole sale -> consider VSL Funnel as the order page modality
The core product is a recurring subscription -> Membership/Continuity
The front-end is a physical book at just-shipping -> Book Funnel

pageStructure.purpose: Capture the email first with a curiosity hook (or deliver a lead magnet), so even non-buyers enter the follow-up sequence; redirect opt-ins to the sales/order page.
keyElements: Curiosity headline tied to the core-product promise
Single email opt-in field (or lead-magnet offer)

pageStructure.page: VSL or Long-Form Sales Letter Order Page
pageStructure.purpose: Sell the $27-$97 core product with a Video Sales Letter or written long-form letter, then convert on an order form with an order bump that lifts AOV toward break-even.
keyElements: VSL (autoplay, timed CTA reveal) OR Star/Story/Solution long-form copy
Value stack with price anchor and $27-$97 reveal
Order form with ORDER BUMP (mini-offer checkbox)
widgets: Skill 44: Order Form with Order Bump element
GHL Payments: $27-$97 core product + bump product
Video embed (Vercel-built VSL page or video element) if VSL modality

pageStructure.purpose: Push average order value above the break-even line with a one-click upsell (higher-tier course, done-for-you version, or bundle).
keyElements: Upsell VSL or short copy with stacked value
widgets: GHL Payments: OTO product (and optional downsell)

primaryPersona.script: SLO recipe + break-even math; order-bump and OTO placement
primaryPersona.role: Governs structure, element checklist, and break-even calibration

salesScript.script: Star / Story / Solution (written) OR 5-Minute / full Perfect Webinar (if VSL)
salesScript.why: The order page can be a long-form letter (Star/Story/Solution) or a video (Perfect Webinar). Choose the modality the audience will consume.

supportingPersonas.role: Positions the SLO as rung one and defines the upsell ladder economics

supportingPersonas.script: Headline + benefit-stack formulas; bump and OTO microcopy; price-justification copy
supportingPersonas.role: Writes the order-page copy, bump, and OTO
Final clarity filter so the offer reads as the customer's transformation, not the product's features

copyFramework.notes: Cookbook governs structure and break-even math; Blackbook sets the Value Ladder; Copywriting Secrets writes the page; StoryBrand keeps the customer as the hero. Pricing + bump + OTO values must be calibrated to hit $1-in/$1-out on cold traffic.

skill6Steps: Create Funnel -> name with client prefix -> Create
Add New Step 2 = 'VSL / Sales Letter Order Page' (build naked HTML in code block, or Vercel embed for a VSL-heavy page)
skill44Widgets: Order Form + Order Bump on Step 2
Tags + follow-up workflow trigger (optins and buyers segmented)
products: Core product priced $27-$97 in GHL Payments
ghlBuild.notes: Pre-build forms/tags/products via Skill 44 (or GHL MCP/API). If the order page is a VSL, build it in Vercel and pull in via embed link; a written letter can live as GHL-compatible HTML in the code-block element. Calibrate price/bump/OTO so the front end recovers ad cost before any email sequence runs.
